Brain Task – DevOps Project

📘 About This Project

This project demonstrates a complete end-to-end DevOps workflow using:

  • Docker – Containerization of the static application
  • Amazon ECR – Secure storage for Docker images
  • Amazon EKS – Kubernetes cluster for production deployment
  • GitHub Actions – Automated CI/CD pipeline
  • CloudWatch Observability – Logs, metrics & monitoring
PRABU S.R
